18	// RunArgs adapter and handed to the existing Run pathway.

415	// Default configuration values.
416	const (
417		DefaultHarness = "codex"
418		// DefaultTimeoutMS is the default idle (inactivity) timeout — resets on
419		// every stdout/stderr byte or agent event. 2 hours is long enough for any
420		// task where the provider streams progress; a stuck provider still needs
421		// DefaultWallClockMS to guarantee termination.
422		DefaultTimeoutMS = 7200000 // 2 hours
423		// DefaultWallClockMS is the absolute wall-clock cap applied in addition to
424		// the idle timeout. It fires regardless of stream/event activity, so a
425		// provider that emits heartbeats forever cannot pin a worker indefinitely.
426		// Sized at 3h — roughly 1.5x the idle timeout — so normal long tasks still
427		// complete while genuinely hung workers free themselves. See
428		// RC2 of ddx-0a651925 for the incident that motivated this bound.
429		DefaultWallClockMS = 10800000 // 3 hours
430		DefaultLogDir      = ".ddx/agent-logs"
431	)

433	// ResolveLogDir returns an absolute session-log directory path anchored at
434	// projectRoot. Callers that construct an agent.Runner must use this to avoid
435	// the Runner's relative DefaultLogDir resolving against process CWD — which
436	// historically wrote logs to stray locations like cli/internal/server/.ddx/.
437	func ResolveLogDir(projectRoot, configured string) string {
438		if configured == "" {
439			configured = DefaultLogDir
440		}
441		if filepath.IsAbs(configured) {
442			return configured
443		}
444		if projectRoot == "" {
445			return configured
446		}
447		return filepath.Join(projectRoot, configured)
448	}

1	// Package evidencelint implements the no-unbounded-prompts structural lint
2	// rule for FEAT-022. It flags four sink patterns that route runtime data
3	// into agent prompts or prompt-adjacent server text egress without going
4	// through the internal/evidence primitives:
5	//
6	//  1. Assignment to a *.Prompt selector whose receiver type is the
7	//     agent.RunOptions struct (or a struct embedding it).
8	//  2. Composite-literal construction of mcpContent{Type: "text", ...}.
9	//  3. os.ReadFile / ioutil.ReadFile / io/ioutil.ReadFile result flowing
10	//     directly into a variable whose name matches *prompt* / *Prompt*.
11	//  4. Calls to response-writer methods (Write, WriteString, Fprintf,
12	//     Encoder.Encode) inside server packages whose data argument
13	//     references library / exec / diff / session / persona source
14	//     packages.
15	//
16	// Static/literal prompt fragments compiled into the binary are exempt.
17	//
18	// A flagged path may be intentionally exempted by adding an
19	//
20	//	// evidence:allow-unbounded reason="..."
21	//
22	// comment on the same line as the offending node, or on a comment line
23	// directly above it. The reason= clause must be present and non-empty.
24	package evidencelint
25	
26	import (
27		"go/ast"
28		"go/token"
29		"go/types"
30		"strings"
31	
32		"golang.org/x/tools/go/analysis"
33		"golang.org/x/tools/go/analysis/passes/inspect"
34		"golang.org/x/tools/go/ast/inspector"
35	)
36	
37	const annotation = "evidence:allow-unbounded"
38

322	func (f *CommandFactory) checkVersionGate(cmd *cobra.Command) error {
323		// Dev builds bypass the gate
324		if f.Version == "" || f.Version == "dev" {
325			return nil
326		}
327	
328		// Read project versions
329		projectVersion := readProjectVersions(f.WorkingDir)
330		if projectVersion == "" || projectVersion == "dev" {
331			return nil // No versions.yaml or dev project — skip
332		}
333	
334		// Exempt commands that must work even when binary is too old
335		switch cmd.Name() {
336		case "upgrade", "version", "doctor", "init", "help", "completion":
337			return nil
338		}
339	
340		// Compare: is the binary older than what the project requires?
341		needsUpgrade, err := update.NeedsUpgrade(f.Version, projectVersion)
342		if err != nil {
343			return nil // Parse error — don't block
344		}
345		if needsUpgrade {
346			return fmt.Errorf("this project requires DDx v%s or newer (you have %s).\nRun 'ddx upgrade' to update your DDx binary",
347				strings.TrimPrefix(projectVersion, "v"),
348				f.Version)
349		}
350	
351		return nil
352	}

390	// displayPluginStalenessHints reads the plugin version cache and shows hints for
391	// any installed plugins that have a newer version available.
392	func (f *CommandFactory) displayPluginStalenessHints(cmd *cobra.Command) {
393		state, err := registry.LoadState()
394		if err != nil || len(state.Installed) == 0 {
395			return
396		}
397	
398		cache := update.NewPluginCache()
399		if err := cache.Load(); err != nil {
400			return // no cache yet — check runs in background, hints appear next time
401		}
402	
403		for _, entry := range state.Installed {
404			latestVersion, ok := cache.Data.Plugins[entry.Name]
405			if !ok {
406				continue
407			}
408			needsUpgrade, err := update.NeedsUpgrade(entry.Version, latestVersion)
409			if err == nil && needsUpgrade {
410				_, _ = fmt.Fprintf(cmd.OutOrStdout(),
411					"\n💡 %s %s installed, %s available. Run 'ddx install %s' to update.\n",
412					entry.Name, entry.Version, latestVersion, entry.Name)
413			}
414		}
415	}

417	// refreshPluginVersionCache fetches the latest version for each installed plugin
418	// from GitHub and writes the result to the plugin cache. Called from the
419	// background update goroutine — failures are silent.
420	func (f *CommandFactory) refreshPluginVersionCache() {
421		cache := update.NewPluginCache()
422		_ = cache.Load() // ignore missing-file error
423	
424		if !cache.IsExpired() {
425			return
426		}
427	
428		state, err := registry.LoadState()
429		if err != nil || len(state.Installed) == 0 {
430			return
431		}
432	
433		reg := registry.BuiltinRegistry()
434		updated := false
435		for _, entry := range state.Installed {
436			pkg, err := reg.Find(entry.Name)
437			if err != nil {
438				continue
439			}
440			release, err := update.FetchLatestReleaseForRepo(pkg.Source)
441			if err != nil {
442				continue
443			}
444			latestVersion := strings.TrimPrefix(release.TagName, "v")
445			cache.Data.Plugins[entry.Name] = latestVersion
446			updated = true
447		}
448	
449		if updated {
450			cache.Data.LastCheck = time.Now()
451			_ = cache.Save()
452		}
453	}

566		if sessionID == "" {

568		}
569	
570		cfg, err := config.LoadWithWorkingDir(f.WorkingDir)
571		if err != nil {
572			return nil
573		}

578		}
579	
580		logDir := agent.ResolveLogDir(f.WorkingDir, sessionLogDir)
581		idx, ok, err := agent.FindSessionIndex(logDir, sessionID)
582		if err != nil {
583			return nil
584		}
585		if ok {
586			entry := agent.SessionIndexEntryToLegacy(idx)
587			bodies := agent.LoadSessionBodies(f.WorkingDir, idx)
588			entry.Prompt = bodies.Prompt
589			entry.Response = bodies.Response
590			entry.Stderr = bodies.Stderr
591			return &entry
592		}
593		return nil
594	}
